bugs.summary: The proposed patch removes `scrapling_fetch` from built-in read-only tool classification.
bugs.impact: `scrapling_fetch` is no longer classified as read-only by the built-in classifier; read-only workflow validation may reject or mishandle stages using only Scrapling unless every spec supplies custom classification metadata.
acceptableFixes: Restore the read-only classification and add a compiler test that Scrapling-only read stages remain read-only.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Regression of a known tool-safety classification invariant.

approval.notes: Locked after revised gold evidence, RED/GREEN repro fix, and final Kimi low approval. Earlier GPT/Kimi reviews confirmed bug existence but requested evidence/repro revisions.
